case_title: JIMMIE OLIVER ET AL VS. AUTO TOWING (LLC)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTON DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR. TO AUG-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS CONTACTED BY TELEPHONE TO INFORM HIM OF THE NEW HEARING DATE.. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT AUTO TOWING HAS NOT BEEN FILED. . A COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS MADE AND MAILED TO PLAINTIFF LISTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND TIME. NO CONTACT INFORMATION IS PROVIDED FOR PLAINTIFF CHAPPLE. NO APPEAREANCES ARE MADE BY PLAINTIFF'S JIMMIE OLIVER AND SPUNISHEA CHAPPLE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AUTO TOWING. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
